title: Estate & Legacy Planning: Rental Succession and Gifting Strategy
description: Develop rental property succession plan and legacy gifting strategy in the recommendations section. Must address: rental property (Glendale condo) succession to children via step-up basis at death, analysis of holding vs gifting the property now, $50,000 legacy gift strategy for each child within 5 years ($100k total), gift tax exclusion utilization (annual exclusion vs lifetime exemption), cash flow impact of $100k gifting on pre-retirement finances, and flag missing estate documents (wills, POA, trust) with recommendations to establish. Out of scope: detailed estate document drafting—focus on strategy and flagging need for attorney engagement.
